spec_match.rationale: CSS declares position-try-options: --flip-up — invalid; that property takes keyword values (most-scroll-position, most-width...), not custom-ident position-try names. The declaration is silently ignored, so the page never exercises the remembered-offset feature.

interactive.rationale: Toggle flips positionTryFallbacks between --flip-up and none, not the v135 feature.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises toggling remembered offset; actually toggles generic fallback.

edge_cases.rationale: Scroll-to button operates on generic fallback, not remembered-offset.

references.rationale: Links chromestatus 5172262683607040 — DIFFERENT feature. Correct ID is 4710507824807936.

openQuestions.title: Use correct position-try-options syntax
openQuestions.detail: Move --flip-up to position-try-fallbacks only; set position-try-options to most-scroll-position (a keyword).

openQuestions.title: Make toggle exercise the v135 feature
openQuestions.detail: Toggle should flip positionTryOptions between most-scroll-position and normal.

summary: Fundamentally broken — invalid position-try-options declaration plus wrong chromestatus ID. Needs syntax rewrite.
